metadata.description: STRW Loop Factory — orchestration plugin for a one-person AI product company.

plugins.name: strw-factory
plugins.description: STRW Loop Factory — runs scheduled/event-driven loops (Discovery, Validation, Build, Growth, Portfolio, Retro) with maker/checker separation, gate discipline (GO/KILL/PIVOT), a git-based state spine, and a single triage inbox for human escalations.
